<file path="packages/orderbook/src/lib/ExplorerUrlBuilder/ExplorerUrlBuilder.spec.ts">
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
import { Network } from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { ExplorerUrlBuilder } from './ExplorerUrlBuilder';

// ============================================
// Tests
// ============================================

describe('ExplorerUrlBuilder', () => {
  // ------- getAddressLink -------
  describe('getAddressLink', () => {
    const address = '0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef12345678';

    it('should return empty string for Bitcoin chains', () => {
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('bitcoin', 'https://blockstream.info', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getAddressLink(address)).toBe('');
    });

    it('should return empty string for Bitcoin testnet', () => {
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('bitcoin_testnet', 'https://blockstream.info/testnet', Network.TESTNET);

      expect(links.getAddressLink(address)).toBe('');
    });

    it('should return Tron address link', () => {
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('tron', 'https://tronscan.org', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getAddressLink(address)).toBe(
        `https://tronscan.org/#/address/${address}`,
      );
    });

    it('should return Starknet address link with /contract/', () => {
      const starknetAddress =
        '0x049d36570d4e46f48e99674bd3fcc84644ddd6b96f7c741b1562b82f9e004dc7';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('starknet', 'https://starkscan.co', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getAddressLink(starknetAddress)).toBe(
        `https://starkscan.co/contract/${starknetAddress}`,
      );
    });

    it('should return XRPL address link with /accounts/', () => {
      const xrplAddress = 'rN7n3473SaZBCG4dFL83w7p1W9cgZw6iFR';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('xrpl', 'https://xrpscan.com', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getAddressLink(xrplAddress)).toBe(
        `https://xrpscan.com/accounts/${xrplAddress}`,
      );
    });

    it('should return Solana mainnet address link without cluster param', () => {
      const solAddress = '5eykt4UsFv8P8NJdTREpY1vzqKqZKvdpKuc147dw2N9d';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('solana', 'https://explorer.solana.com', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getAddressLink(solAddress)).toBe(
        `https://explorer.solana.com/address/${solAddress}`,
      );
    });

    it('should return Solana testnet address link with ?cluster=devnet', () => {
      const solAddress = '5eykt4UsFv8P8NJdTREpY1vzqKqZKvdpKuc147dw2N9d';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('solana_testnet', 'https://explorer.solana.com', Network.TESTNET);

      expect(links.getAddressLink(solAddress)).toBe(
        `https://explorer.solana.com/address/${solAddress}?cluster=devnet`,
      );
    });

    it('should return default /address/ link for EVM chains', () => {
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('ethereum', 'https://etherscan.io', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getAddressLink(address)).toBe(
        `https://etherscan.io/address/${address}`,
      );
    });

    it('should return default /address/ link for Arbitrum', () => {
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('arbitrum', 'https://arbiscan.io', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getAddressLink(address)).toBe(
        `https://arbiscan.io/address/${address}`,
      );
    });
  });

  // ------- getTxLink -------
  describe('getTxLink', () => {
    const txHash =
      '0x6d376501b6b0978c7c8b438e9929de92f67593fbeefbb6fe0e1b56f66e167561';

    it('should return Tron tx link', () => {
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('tron', 'https://tronscan.org', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getTxLink(txHash)).toBe(
        `https://tronscan.org/#/transaction/6d376501b6b0978c7c8b438e9929de92f67593fbeefbb6fe0e1b56f66e167561`,
      );
    });

    it('should return XRPL tx link with /transactions/', () => {
      const xrplTx =
        'E08D6E9754025BA2534A78707605E0601F03ACE063687A0CA1BDDACFCD1698C7';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('xrpl', 'https://xrpscan.com', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getTxLink(xrplTx)).toBe(
        `https://xrpscan.com/transactions/${xrplTx}`,
      );
    });

    it('should return Solana mainnet tx link without cluster param', () => {
      const solTx =
        '5VERv8NMvzbJMEkV8xnrLkEaWRtSz9CosKDYjCJjBRnbJLgp8uirBgmQpjKhoR4tjF3ZpRzrFmBV6UjKdiSZkQQ';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('solana', 'https://explorer.solana.com', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getTxLink(solTx)).toBe(
        `https://explorer.solana.com/tx/${solTx}`,
      );
    });

    it('should return Solana testnet tx link with ?cluster=devnet', () => {
      const solTx =
        '5VERv8NMvzbJMEkV8xnrLkEaWRtSz9CosKDYjCJjBRnbJLgp8uirBgmQpjKhoR4tjF3ZpRzrFmBV6UjKdiSZkQQ';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('solana_testnet', 'https://explorer.solana.com', Network.TESTNET);

      expect(links.getTxLink(solTx)).toBe(
        `https://explorer.solana.com/tx/${solTx}?cluster=devnet`,
      );
    });

    it('should return default /tx/ link for EVM chains', () => {
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('ethereum', 'https://etherscan.io', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getTxLink(txHash)).toBe(
        `https://etherscan.io/tx/${txHash}`,
      );
    });

    it('should return default /tx/ link for Arbitrum', () => {
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('arbitrum', 'https://arbiscan.io', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getTxLink(txHash)).toBe(
        `https://arbiscan.io/tx/${txHash}`,
      );
    });

    // ------- Tx hash parsing -------
    it('should parse tx hash from comma-separated string (takes last part)', () => {
      const compositeInput = 'prefix,0xdeadbeef';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('ethereum', 'https://etherscan.io', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getTxLink(compositeInput)).toBe(
        'https://etherscan.io/tx/0xdeadbeef',
      );
    });

    it('should parse tx hash with colon-separated suffix (takes first part after split)', () => {
      const compositeInput = 'prefix,0xdeadbeef:suffix';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('ethereum', 'https://etherscan.io', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getTxLink(compositeInput)).toBe(
        'https://etherscan.io/tx/0xdeadbeef',
      );
    });

    it('should trim whitespace from parsed tx hash', () => {
      const compositeInput = 'prefix,  0xdeadbeef  :suffix';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('ethereum', 'https://etherscan.io', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getTxLink(compositeInput)).toBe(
        'https://etherscan.io/tx/0xdeadbeef',
      );
    });

    it('should handle a plain tx hash (no comma or colon)', () => {
      const plainTx = '0xplaintxhash';
      const links = new ExplorerUrlBuilder('ethereum', 'https://etherscan.io', Network.MAINNET);

      expect(links.getTxLink(plainTx)).toBe(
        'https://etherscan.io/tx/0xplaintxhash',
      );
    });
  });
});
</file>

<file path="packages/react-hooks/src/lib/context/GardenProvider.tsx">
import React, { createContext, FC, useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react';
import { useOrderbook } from '../hooks/useOrderbook';
import {
  Garden,
  IGardenJS,
  Quote,
  QuoteParamsForAssets,
  resolveApiConfig,
  OrderCreationStatus,
} from '@gardenfi/core';
import { SwapParams } from '@gardenfi/core';
import type {
  GardenContextType,
  GardenProviderProps,
} from './gardenProvider.types';
import { hasAnyValidValue, resolveAuth } from '../utils';
import { Err, Ok, StoreKeys } from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { PendingOrdersManager } from '../pendingOrdersManager';

export const GardenContext = createContext<GardenContextType>({
  pendingOrders: [],
});

export const GardenProvider: FC<GardenProviderProps> = ({
  children,
  config,
  store,
}) => {
  const [garden, setGarden] = useState<IGardenJS>();

  const setRedeemServiceEnabled = true;
  // Determine network from config
  const network = useMemo(() => {
    const { network: resolvedNetwork } = resolveApiConfig(config.environment);
    return resolvedNetwork;
  }, [config.environment]);

  const ordersManager = useMemo(
    () => new PendingOrdersManager(store, StoreKeys.PENDING_ORDERS),
    [store],
  );

  const { pendingOrders } = useOrderbook(garden, store, network);

  const quote = useMemo(() => {
    const { api } = resolveApiConfig(config.environment);
    return config.quote ?? new Quote(api.baseurl, resolveAuth(config.apiKey));
  }, [config.environment, config.quote, config.apiKey]);

  const getQuote = useMemo(
    () =>
      async ({
        fromAsset,
        toAsset,
        amount,
        isExactOut = false,
        options,
      }: QuoteParamsForAssets) => {
        const _quote = garden ? garden.quote : quote;
        return await _quote.getQuoteFromAssets({
          fromAsset,
          toAsset,
          amount,
          isExactOut,
          options,
        });
      },
    [garden, quote],
  );

  const swap = async (
    params: SwapParams,
    onProgress?: (status: OrderCreationStatus) => void,
  ) => {
    if (!garden) return Err('Garden not initialized');

    const order = await garden.createSwap(params, onProgress);
    if (!order.val) return Err(order.error || 'Unknown error occurred');

    if (setRedeemServiceEnabled) {
      try {
        let orderId: string | undefined;
        if (typeof order.val === 'string') {
          orderId = order.val;
        } else if (order.val && typeof order.val.order_id === 'string') {
          orderId = order.val.order_id;
        }

        if (orderId) {
          ordersManager.add(network, orderId);
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.error('Failed to persist pending order id', e);
      }
    }

    return Ok(order.val);
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!('wallets' in config) && !('htlc' in config)) return;

    let garden: Garden;
    if (
      'wallets' in config &&
      Object.keys(config.wallets ?? {}).length > 0 &&
      hasAnyValidValue(config.wallets ?? {})
    ) {
      garden = Garden.fromWallets({
        ...config,
      });
    } else if (
      'htlc' in config &&
      Object.keys(config.htlc ?? {}).length > 0 &&
      hasAnyValidValue(config.htlc ?? {})
    ) {
      garden = new Garden({
        ...config,
      });
    } else {
      return;
    }

    setGarden(garden);
  }, [config]);

  return (
    <GardenContext.Provider
      value={{
        swap,
        pendingOrders,
        getQuote,
        garden,
        orderBook: garden,
      }}
    >
      {children}
    </GardenContext.Provider>
  );
};

export const useGarden = () => {
  const garden = React.useContext(GardenContext);
  if (!garden)
    throw new Error('useGarden must be used within a GardenProvider');
  return garden;
};
</file>

<file path="packages/react-hooks/src/lib/hooks/useOrderbook.tsx">
import { IGardenJS, OrderWithStatus } from '@gardenfi/core';
import { OrderStatus, OrderLifecycle } from '@gardenfi/orderbook';
import { IStore, Network, StoreKeys } from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { useEffect, useState, useRef, useCallback, useMemo } from 'react';
import { PendingOrdersManager } from '../pendingOrdersManager';

export const useOrderbook = (
  garden: IGardenJS | undefined,
  store: IStore,
  network?: Network | string,
) => {
  const [pendingOrders, setPendingOrders] = useState<OrderWithStatus[]>([]);
  const timeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  const isFetchingRef = useRef<boolean>(false);
  const initialFetchDoneRef = useRef<boolean>(false);
  const FETCH_DELAY = 5000; // 5 seconds

  const ordersManager = useMemo(
    () => new PendingOrdersManager(store, StoreKeys.PENDING_ORDERS),
    [store],
  );

  const getAddressesFromHTLCs = useCallback((): string[] => {
    if (!garden) return [];

    const addressSet = new Set<string>();

    try {
      const syncAddresses = [
        garden.htlcs?.evm?.htlcActorAddress,
        garden.htlcs?.sui?.htlcActorAddress,
        garden.htlcs?.solana?.htlcActorAddress,
        garden.htlcs?.starknet?.htlcActorAddress,
        garden.htlcs?.bitcoin?.htlcActorAddress,
        garden.htlcs?.tron?.htlcActorAddress,
        garden.htlcs?.xrpl?.htlcActorAddress,
      ].filter((addr): addr is string => !!addr && addr.length > 0);

      syncAddresses.forEach((addr) => addressSet.add(addr.toLowerCase()));
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error getting HTLC addresses:', error);
    }

    return Array.from(addressSet);
  }, [garden]);

  const fetchInitialPendingOrders = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!garden) return;

    try {
      const addresses = getAddressesFromHTLCs();

      if (addresses.length === 0) {
        console.log('No HTLC addresses found for initial pending orders fetch');
        return;
      }

      // Fetch pending orders from all addresses
      const orderPromises = addresses.map(async (address) => {
        try {
          const notInitiatedAndPendingOrders = await garden.getOrders({
              address: address,
              status: [OrderLifecycle.notInitiated, OrderLifecycle.pending],
              per_page: 500,
            })
          
          if (notInitiatedAndPendingOrders.ok) {
            return notInitiatedAndPendingOrders.val.data;
          }
          return [];
        } catch (error) {
          console.error(`Error fetching orders for address ${address}:`, error);
          return [];
        }
      });

      // Wait for all order fetches to complete
      const allOrders = await Promise.all(orderPromises);
      const orderIds = allOrders.flat().map((order) => order.order_id);
      ordersManager.set(network, orderIds);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching initial pending orders:', error);
    }
  }, [garden, ordersManager, getAddressesFromHTLCs, network]);

  const fetchPendingOrders = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!garden) return;

    try {
      const ids = ordersManager.get(network);
      // Ensure uniqueness when reading from storage
      const uniqueIds = Array.from(new Set(ids));

      if (uniqueIds.length === 0) {
        setPendingOrders([]);
        return;
      }

      const results = await Promise.all(
        uniqueIds.map((id) => garden.getOrder(id)),
      );

      const orders: OrderWithStatus[] = [];
      const remainingIds: string[] = [];

      results.forEach((res, idx) => {
        if (!res.ok) {
          remainingIds.push(uniqueIds[idx]);
          return;
        }

        const order = res.val;
        const isCompleted =
          order.status === OrderStatus.Redeemed ||
          order.status === OrderStatus.Refunded ||
          order.status === OrderStatus.Expired;
        if (isCompleted) {
          return;
        }

        orders.push(order);
        remainingIds.push(uniqueIds[idx]);
      });

      // Ensure uniqueness before saving
      const uniqueRemainingIds = Array.from(new Set(remainingIds));
      ordersManager.set(network, uniqueRemainingIds);

      setPendingOrders(orders);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching pending orders:', error);
    }
  }, [garden, ordersManager, network]);

  // Get all HTLC addresses to track changes - using useMemo to prevent re-computation on every render
  const htlcAddresses = useMemo(() => {
    try {
      return getAddressesFromHTLCs().join(',');
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error computing HTLC addresses:', error);
      return '';
    }
  }, [getAddressesFromHTLCs]);

  const previousAddressesRef = useRef<string>('');

  // Initial fetch - runs when addresses are first available or when they change
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!garden || !garden.redeemServiceEnabled || !htlcAddresses) return;

    // Check if addresses have changed
    const addressesChanged = previousAddressesRef.current !== htlcAddresses;

    if (addressesChanged) {
      // Reset the initial fetch flag when addresses change
      initialFetchDoneRef.current = false;
      previousAddressesRef.current = htlcAddresses;
    }

    if (!initialFetchDoneRef.current) {
      fetchInitialPendingOrders();
      initialFetchDoneRef.current = true;
    }
  }, [garden, htlcAddresses, fetchInitialPendingOrders, network]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!garden) return;

    if (garden.redeemServiceEnabled) {
      let stopped = false;

      const scheduleNext = () => {
        if (stopped) return;
        timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(run, FETCH_DELAY);
      };

      const run = async () => {
        if (stopped) return;
        if (isFetchingRef.current) {
          scheduleNext();
          return;
        }
        isFetchingRef.current = true;
        try {
          await fetchPendingOrders();
        } finally {
          isFetchingRef.current = false;
        }
        scheduleNext();
      };

      run();

      return () => {
        stopped = true;
        if (timeoutRef.current) {
          clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);
          timeoutRef.current = null;
        }
      };
    } else {
      // When redeem service is disabled, use events
      const handlePendingOrdersChange = (orders: OrderWithStatus[]) =>
        setPendingOrders(orders);

      garden.on('onPendingOrdersChanged', handlePendingOrdersChange);

      return () => {
        garden.off('onPendingOrdersChanged', handlePendingOrdersChange);
      };
    }
  }, [garden, fetchPendingOrders]);

  return { pendingOrders };
};
</file>

<file path="packages/walletConnectors/src/bitcoin/btcWalletsProvider.types.ts">
import { IInjectedBitcoinProvider } from './bitcoin.types';
import { AsyncResult, IStore, Network, Result } from '@gardenfi/utils';

export type AvailableWallets = {
  [key: string]: IInjectedBitcoinProvider;
};

export type BTCWalletProviderContextType = {
  availableWallets: AvailableWallets;
  connect: (
    BitcoinWallet: IInjectedBitcoinProvider,
    network?: Network,
  ) => AsyncResult<void, string>;
  updateAccount: () => Promise<void>;
  provider: IInjectedBitcoinProvider | undefined;
  account: string | undefined;
  network: Network | undefined;
  disconnect: () => Result<void, string>;
  isConnecting: boolean;
  isConnected: boolean;
};

export type CustomWalletConfig = {
  id: string;
  provider: IInjectedBitcoinProvider;
};

export type BTCWalletProviderProps = {
  network: Network;
  children: React.ReactNode;
  store: IStore;
  wallets?: CustomWalletConfig[];
};
</file>

<file path="packages/walletConnectors/src/litecoin/constants.ts">
export const SupportedWallets = {
  Ctrl: {
    id: 'ctrl',
    name: 'CTRL Wallet',
    icon: 'https://garden.imgix.net/wallets/ctrl.svg',
  },
};

export const WALLET_CONFIG = {
  Ctrl: {
    id: 'ctrl',
    name: 'CTRL Wallet',
    icon: 'https://garden.imgix.net/wallets/ctrl.svg',
  },
} as const;
</file>

<file path="packages/walletConnectors/src/litecoin/ltcWalletsProvider.tsx">
import React, {
  useState,
  createContext,
  useContext,
  useEffect,
  useCallback,
  useMemo,
} from 'react';
import { CtrlProvider } from './providers/ctrl/provider';
import {
  AvailableWallets,
  LTCWalletProviderContextType,
  LTCWalletProviderProps,
} from './ltcWalletsProvider.types';
import { Err, Ok, Void } from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { Connect, IInjectedLitecoinProvider } from './litecoin.types';

const LTCWalletProviderContext = createContext<
  LTCWalletProviderContextType | undefined
>(undefined);

export const LTCWalletProvider = ({
  children,
  network,
  store,
}: LTCWalletProviderProps) => {
  const [provider, setProvider] = useState<IInjectedLitecoinProvider>();
  const [account, setAccount] = useState<string>();
  const [isConnecting, setIsConnecting] = useState<boolean>(false);
  const [availableWallets, setAvailableWallets] = useState<AvailableWallets>(
    {},
  );

  const isConnected = useMemo(
    () => !!provider && !!account,
    [provider, account],
  );

  //connect to the specified wallet and set the provider and account
  const connect = async (litecoinWallet: IInjectedLitecoinProvider) => {
    setIsConnecting(true);
    const res = await litecoinWallet.connect(network);
    if (!res.ok) {
      setIsConnecting(false);
      return Err(res.error);
    }

    if (res.val.network !== network) {
      setIsConnecting(false);
      return Err('Network mismatch');
    }

    setProvider(res.val.provider);
    setAccount(res.val.address);

    store.setItem('litecoinWallet', JSON.stringify(res.val));

    setIsConnecting(false);
    return Ok(Void);
  };

  const disconnect = () => {
    if (!provider) return Err('No provider to disconnect');
    provider.disconnect();
    setProvider(undefined);
    setAccount(undefined);

    store.removeItem('litecoinWallet');

    return Ok(Void);
  };

  const updateAccount = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!provider) return;

    const accounts = await provider.getAccounts();
    if (!accounts.ok) {
      console.error('Error getting accounts:', accounts.error);
      return;
    }

    setAccount(accounts.val[0]);
  }, [provider]);

  //adds wallet to the available wallet list
  const addToWalletList = (wallet: IInjectedLitecoinProvider) => {
    setAvailableWallets((p) => ({
      ...p,
      [wallet.id]: wallet,
    }));
  };

  const updateWalletList = async () => {
    const ctrl = (window as any).ctrl ?? (window as any).xfi;
    if (ctrl && ctrl.litecoin) {
      const ctrlProvider = new CtrlProvider(ctrl.litecoin);
      addToWalletList(ctrlProvider);
    }
  };

  const initializeProviderAndAccount = async () => {
    const previousConnectedData = store.getItem('litecoinWallet');
    if (previousConnectedData) {
      const isAlreadyConnected: Connect = JSON.parse(previousConnectedData);
      const provider = availableWallets[isAlreadyConnected.id];
      if (provider) {
        const addresses = await provider.getAccounts();
        if (!addresses.ok || !addresses.val[0]) return;

        setProvider(provider);
        setAccount(addresses.val[0]);
      }
    }
  };

  //updates the available wallets list
  useEffect(() => {
    updateWalletList();
  }, []);

  // if the wallet is already connected then set the provider and account
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!availableWallets) return;
    initializeProviderAndAccount();
  }, [availableWallets]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!provider) return;

    const handleAccountsChanged = async (accounts: string[]) => {
      if (accounts.length === 0) return;
      setAccount(accounts[0]);
    };
    provider.on('accountsChanged', handleAccountsChanged);

    return () => {
      provider.off('accountsChanged', handleAccountsChanged);
    };
  }, [provider]);

  return (
    <LTCWalletProviderContext.Provider
      value={{
        availableWallets,
        connect,
        provider,
        account,
        network,
        isConnecting,
        updateAccount,
        disconnect,
        isConnected,
      }}
    >
      {children}
    </LTCWalletProviderContext.Provider>
  );
};

export const useLitecoinWallet = () => {
  const context = useContext(LTCWalletProviderContext);
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error('useLitecoinWallet must be used within LTCWalletProvider');
  }
  return context;
};
</file>

<file path="packages/walletConnectors/src/litecoin/providers/ctrl/provider.ts">
import { CtrlLitecoinProvider } from './ctrl.types';
import { getBalance } from '../../utils';
import { AsyncResult, Err, Network, Ok } from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { WALLET_CONFIG } from '../../constants';
import {
  Connect,
  IInjectedLitecoinProvider,
  LtcBalance,
} from '../../litecoin.types';

/**
 * Returns the CTRL Litecoin provider from the window object.
 * CTRL wallet migrated from window.xfi to window.ctrl.
 */
function getCtrlLitecoinProvider(): CtrlLitecoinProvider | undefined {
  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return undefined;
  const ctrl = (window as any).ctrl ?? (window as any).xfi;
  return ctrl?.litecoin;
}

/**
 * Helper to promisify CTRL wallet's callback-based request API.
 * All CTRL interactions go through: provider.request({ method, params }, callback)
 */
function ctrlRequest<T>(
  provider: CtrlLitecoinProvider,
  method: string,
  params: any[] = [],
): Promise<T> {
  return new Promise<T>((resolve, reject) => {
    provider.request({ method, params }, (error: any, result: T) => {
      if (error) reject(error);
      else resolve(result);
    });
  });
}

export class CtrlProvider implements IInjectedLitecoinProvider {
  #ctrlProvider: CtrlLitecoinProvider;
  #network: Network;
  public address: string = '';
  public id = WALLET_CONFIG.Ctrl.id;
  public name = WALLET_CONFIG.Ctrl.name;
  public icon = WALLET_CONFIG.Ctrl.icon;

  constructor(ctrlProvider: CtrlLitecoinProvider) {
    this.#ctrlProvider = ctrlProvider;
    this.#network = Network.MAINNET;
  }

  async connect(network?: Network): AsyncResult<Connect, string> {
    try {
      const ltcProvider = getCtrlLitecoinProvider();
      if (!ltcProvider)
        return Err('CTRL wallet Litecoin provider not found');

      this.#ctrlProvider = ltcProvider;

      if (!network) network = Network.MAINNET;
      this.#network = network;

      const accounts = await this.requestAccounts();
      if (!accounts.ok)
        return Err('Failed to get accounts from CTRL wallet');
      if (accounts.val.length === 0)
        return Err('No accounts found in CTRL wallet');

      this.address = accounts.val[0];

      return Ok({
        address: this.address,
        provider: this,
        network: this.#network,
        id: WALLET_CONFIG.Ctrl.id,
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return Err('Error while connecting to the CTRL wallet', error);
    }
  }

  async requestAccounts(): AsyncResult<string[], string> {
    try {
      const accounts = await ctrlRequest<string[]>(
        this.#ctrlProvider,
        'request_accounts',
      );
      if (accounts && accounts.length > 0) {
        this.address = accounts[0];
      }
      return Ok(accounts);
    } catch (error) {
      return Err('Error while requesting accounts from the CTRL wallet');
    }
  }

  async getAccounts(): AsyncResult<string[], string> {
    return this.requestAccounts();
  }

  async getNetwork(): AsyncResult<Network, string> {
    return Ok(this.#network);
  }

  async switchNetwork(): AsyncResult<Network, string> {
    this.#network =
      this.#network === Network.MAINNET ? Network.TESTNET : Network.MAINNET;
    const accounts = await this.requestAccounts();
    if (!accounts.ok) {
      return Err(`Failed to get CTRL accounts: ${accounts.error}`);
    }
    return Ok(this.#network);
  }

  async getBalance(): AsyncResult<LtcBalance, string> {
    if (!this.address) {
      const accounts = await this.requestAccounts();
      if (!accounts.ok) return Err('Failed to get address for balance');
    }
    const res = await getBalance(this.address, this.#network);
    if (!res.ok) return Err(res.error);
    return Ok(res.val);
  }

  sendLitecoin = async (
    toAddress: string,
    satoshis: number,
  ): AsyncResult<string, string> => {
    try {
      // Ensure address is populated
      if (!this.address) {
        const accounts = await this.requestAccounts();
        if (!accounts.ok || accounts.val.length === 0)
          return Err('No connected account to send from');
      }

      const txHash = await ctrlRequest<string>(
        this.#ctrlProvider,
        'transfer',
        [
          {
            feeRate: 10,
            from: this.address,
            recipient: toAddress,
            amount: {
              amount: satoshis,
              decimals: 8,
            },
            memo: '',
          },
        ],
      );
      return Ok(txHash);
    } catch (error) {
      return Err(
        `Error while sending Litecoin: ${error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)}`,
      );
    }
  };

  on = (event: string, callback: (data: any) => void) =>
    this.#ctrlProvider.on(event, callback);

  off = (event: string, callback: (data: any) => void) =>
    this.#ctrlProvider.off(event, callback);

  disconnect = (): AsyncResult<string, string> => {
    this.address = '';
    return Promise.resolve(Ok('Disconnected CTRL wallet'));
  };
}
</file>

<file path="packages/walletConnectors/src/spark/providers/sparkWalletsProvider.tsx">
import React, {
  useState,
  createContext,
  useContext,
  useEffect,
  useCallback,
  useMemo,
} from "react";
import { SparkConnect, IInjectedSparkProvider } from "../spark.types";
import { XverseSparkProvider } from "./xverse/provider";
import { XVerseSparkProvider as XVerseSparkProviderType } from "./xverse/xverse.types";
import {
  AvailableWallets,
  SparkWalletProviderContextType,
  SparkWalletProviderProps,
} from "./sparkWalletsProvider.types";
import { Err, Ok, Void } from "@gardenfi/utils";
import { getProviders } from "sats-connect";

declare global {
  interface Window {
    XverseProviders?: {
      BitcoinProvider: XVerseSparkProviderType;
    };
  }
}

const SparkWalletProviderContext = createContext<
  SparkWalletProviderContextType | undefined
>(undefined);

export const SparkWalletProvider = ({
  children,
  network,
  store,
}: SparkWalletProviderProps) => {
  const [provider, setProvider] = useState<IInjectedSparkProvider>();
  const [account, setAccount] = useState<string>();
  const [isConnecting, setIsConnecting] = useState<boolean>(false);
  const [availableWallets, setAvailableWallets] = useState<AvailableWallets>(
    {},
  );

  const isConnected = useMemo(
    () => !!provider && !!account,
    [provider, account],
  );

  //connect to the specified wallet and set the provider and account
  const connect = async (sparkWallet: IInjectedSparkProvider) => {
    setIsConnecting(true);
    const res = await sparkWallet.connect(network);
    if (!res.ok) {
      setIsConnecting(false);
      return Err(res.error);
    }

    if (res.val.network !== network) {
      setIsConnecting(false);
      return Err("Network mismatch");
    }

    setProvider(res.val.provider);
    setAccount(res.val.address);

    store.setItem("sparkWallet", JSON.stringify(res.val));

    setIsConnecting(false);
    return Ok(Void);
  };

  const disconnect = () => {
    if (!provider) return Err("No provider to disconnect");
    provider.disconnect();
    setProvider(undefined);
    setAccount(undefined);

    store.removeItem("sparkWallet");

    return Ok(Void);
  };

  const updateAccount = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!provider) return;

    const accounts = await provider.getAccounts();
    if (!accounts.ok) {
      console.error("Error getting accounts:", accounts.error);
      return;
    }

    setAccount(accounts.val[0]);

    const network = await provider.getNetwork();
    if (network.error) {
      console.error("Error getting network:", network.error);
      return;
    }
  }, [provider]);

  //adds wallet to the available wallet list
  const addToWalletList = (wallet: IInjectedSparkProvider) => {
    setAvailableWallets((p) => ({
      ...p,
      [wallet.id]: wallet,
    }));
  };

  const updateWalletList = async () => {
    // Check for Xverse provider using sats-connect
    try {
      const providers = getProviders();
      const xverseProvider = providers.find(
        (p: { id: string }) =>
          p.id === "BitcoinProvider" ||
          p.id.toLowerCase().includes("xverseproviders.bitcoinprovider"),
      );

      if (xverseProvider && window.XverseProviders?.BitcoinProvider) {
        const sparkProvider = new XverseSparkProvider(
          window.XverseProviders.BitcoinProvider,
        );

        addToWalletList(sparkProvider);
      } else if (window.XverseProviders?.BitcoinProvider) {
        // Fallback: use window.XverseProviders directly
        const sparkProvider = new XverseSparkProvider(
          window.XverseProviders.BitcoinProvider,
        );
        addToWalletList(sparkProvider);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      // If sats-connect is not available, try direct window access
      if (window.XverseProviders?.BitcoinProvider) {
        const sparkProvider = new XverseSparkProvider(
          window.XverseProviders.BitcoinProvider,
        );
        addToWalletList(sparkProvider);
      }
    }
  };

  const initializeProviderAndAccount = async () => {
    const previousConnectedData = store.getItem("sparkWallet");
    if (previousConnectedData) {
      const isAlreadyConnected: SparkConnect = JSON.parse(
        previousConnectedData,
      );
      const _provider = availableWallets[isAlreadyConnected.id];
      if (_provider) {
        const addresses = await _provider.getAccounts();
        if (!addresses.ok || !addresses.val[0]) return;

        const currentNetwork = await _provider.getNetwork();
        if (currentNetwork.error) return;
        if (currentNetwork.val !== network) return;

        setProvider(_provider);
        setAccount(addresses.val[0]);
      }
    }
  };

  //updates the available wallets list
  useEffect(() => {
    updateWalletList();
  }, []);

  // if the wallet is already connected then set the provider and account
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!availableWallets) return;
    initializeProviderAndAccount();
  }, [availableWallets]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!provider) return;

    const handleAccountsChanged = async (accounts: string[]) => {
      if (accounts.length === 0) return;
      setAccount(accounts[0]);
    };
    provider.on("accountsChanged", handleAccountsChanged);

    return () => {
      provider.off("accountsChanged", handleAccountsChanged);
    };
  }, [provider]);

  return (
    <SparkWalletProviderContext.Provider
      value={{
        availableWallets,
        connect,
        provider,
        account,
        network,
        isConnecting,
        updateAccount,
        disconnect,
        isConnected,
      }}
    >
      {children}
    </SparkWalletProviderContext.Provider>
  );
};

export const useSparkWallet = () => {
  const context = useContext(SparkWalletProviderContext);
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error("useSparkWallet must be used within SparkWalletProvider");
  }
  return context;
};
</file>

<file path="packages/core/src/lib/quote/quote.spec.ts">
import { Assets } from '@gardenfi/orderbook';
import { Quote } from './quote';
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
import { ApiKey } from '@gardenfi/utils';

describe('quote', () => {
  const quoteUrl = 'https://api.garden.finance';
  const quote = new Quote(quoteUrl, new ApiKey(''));

  it.only('should get quote for btc-usdt', async () => {
    const res = await quote.getQuote(
      'bitcoin:btc',
      'ethereum:usdt',
      500000000,
      false,
      {
        indicative: true,
      },
    );
    console.log(res.val)
    expect(res.val).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should get quote for strk-btc', async () => {
    const res = await quote.getQuote(
      'starknet:wbtc',
      'bitcoin:btc',
      500000,
      true,
    );
    console.log('quote :', res.val);
    console.log('quote error :', res.error);
    expect(res.error).toBeUndefined();
    expect(res.val).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should get quote for strk-evm', async () => {
    const res = await quote.getQuote(
      'starknet:wbtc',
      'bitcoin:btc',
      500000,
      false,
      {
        affiliateFee: 1000,
      },
    );
    console.log('quote :', res.val);
    console.log('quote error :', res.error);
    expect(res.error).toBeUndefined();
    expect(res.val).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('get quote ƒrom assets', async () => {
    const res = await quote.getQuoteFromAssets({
      fromAsset: Assets.arbitrum_sepolia.WBTC,
      toAsset: Assets.bitcoin_testnet.BTC,
      amount: 100000,
      isExactOut: true,
    });
    console.log('quote :', res.val);
    expect(res.ok).toBeTruthy();
    expect(res.val).toBeTruthy();

    if (!res.ok) return;
  });

  // it('test', async () => {
  //   const res = await quote.getAttestedQuote({
  //     source_chain: 'arbitrum_localnet',
  //     destination_chain: 'ethereum_localnet',
  //     source_asset: '0xDc64a140Aa3E981100a9becA4E685f962f0cF6C9',
  //     destination_asset: '0xe7f1725E7734CE288F8367e1Bb143E90bb3F0512',
  //     initiator_source_address: '0x52FE8afbbB800a33edcbDB1ea87be2547EB30000',
  //     initiator_destination_address:
  //       '0x52FE8afbbB800a33edcbDB1ea87be2547EB30000',
  //     source_amount: '100000',
  //     destination_amount: '99990',
  //     fee: '1',
  //     nonce: '1',
  //     timelock: 14400,
  //     secret_hash:
  //       '0x7f769a74a0d00749b3995993aaa1312be285a4a2c8fa7f3d0a58f575be0cc62e',
  //     min_destination_confirmations: 3,
  //     additional_data: {
  //       strategy_id: 'alel12',
  //     },
  //   });
  //   console.log('attested quote :', res.val);
  //   if (res.error) console.log('error :', res.error);
  //   expect(res.error).toBeUndefined();
  //   expect(res.val).toBeTruthy();
  // }, 30000);

  // it('should get strategies', async () => {
  //   const res = await quote.getStrategies();
  //   console.log('strategies :', res.val);
  //   expect(res.error).toBeUndefined();
  //   expect(res.val).toBeTruthy();
  // });
});

<file path="packages/core/src/lib/switchOrAddNetwork.ts">
import {
  arbitrum,
  arbitrumSepolia,
  base,
  baseSepolia,
  berachain,
  berachainTestnetbArtio,
  mainnet,
  sepolia,
  Chain as viemChain,
  monadTestnet,
  citreaTestnet,
  unichain,
  corn,
  bsc,
  bscTestnet,
  coreDao,
} from 'viem/chains';
import {
  ArbitrumLocalnet,
  EthereumLocalnet,
  EVMChains,
} from '@gardenfi/orderbook';
import { createWalletClient, custom, http, WalletClient } from 'viem';
import { AsyncResult, Err, Ok } from '@gardenfi/utils';

type ViemError = {
  code?: number;
  message?: string;
  body?: {
    method?: string;
  };
};

const updatedSepolia = {
  ...sepolia,
  rpcUrls: {
    default: {
      http: ['https://ethereum-sepolia-rpc.publicnode.com'],
    },
  },
};

export const botanixMainnet: viemChain = {
  id: 3637,

      name: 'Botanix Explorer',
      url: 'https://botanixscan.io/',
    },
  },
  rpcUrls: {
    default: {
      http: ['https://rpc.botanixlabs.com/'],
    },
  },
};

export const hyperliquidTestnet: viemChain = {
  id: 998,

  nativeCurrency: {
    name: 'Hyperliquid',
    symbol: 'HYPE',
    decimals: 18,
  },
  blockExplorers: {
    default: {
      name: 'Hyperliquid Explorer',
      url: 'https://testnet.purrsec.com/',
    },
  },
  rpcUrls: {
    default: {
      http: ['https://rpc.hyperliquid-testnet.xyz/evm'],
    },
  },
};

export const hyperevm: viemChain = {
  id: 999,
  name: 'HyperEVM',
  nativeCurrency: {
    name: 'Hyperliquid',
    symbol: 'HYPE',
    decimals: 18,
  },

      name: 'Hyperliquid Explorer',
      url: 'https://hyperscan.gas.zip/',
    },
  },

    },
  },

export const alpenTestnet: viemChain = {
  id: 8150,
  name: 'Alpen Network',
  nativeCurrency: {
    name: 'Signet bitcoin',
    symbol: 'sBTC',
    decimals: 18,
  },
  blockExplorers: {
    default: {
      name: 'Alpen Explorer',
      url: 'https://explorer.pectra-testnet.alpenlabs.io',
    },
  },

    },
  },

export const monadMainnet: viemChain = {

    symbol: 'MON',
    decimals: 18,
  },
  blockExplorers: {

      name: 'Monad Explorer',
      url: 'https://monadvision.com/',
    },
  },

      http: ['https://rpc1.monad.xyz'],
    },
  },
};

export const citreaMainnet: viemChain = {
  id: 4114,
  name: 'Citrea Mainnet',
  nativeCurrency: {
    name: 'Citrea Bitcoin',
    symbol: 'cBTC',
    decimals: 18
  },
  rpcUrls: {
    default: {
      http: ['https://rpc.mainnet.citrea.xyz'],
    },
  },
  blockExplorers: {
    default: {
      name: 'Citrea Explorer',
      url: 'https://explorer.mainnet.citrea.xyz',
      apiUrl: 'https://explorer.mainnet.citrea.xyz/api',
    },
  },
  testnet: false,
}

export const megaethMainnet: viemChain = {
  id: 4326,
  name: 'MegaETH',
  nativeCurrency: {
    name: 'MegaETH',
    symbol: 'MEGA',
    decimals: 18
  },
  rpcUrls: {
    default: {
      http: ['https://mainnet.megaeth.com/rpc'],
    },
  },
  blockExplorers: {
    default: {
      name: 'MegaETH Explorer',
      url: 'https://megaeth.blockscout.com/',
    },
  },
  testnet: false,
};

export const evmToViemChainMap: Record<EVMChains, viemChain> = {
  ethereum: mainnet,
  arbitrum: arbitrum,
  ethereum_sepolia: updatedSepolia,
  arbitrum_sepolia: arbitrumSepolia,
  ethereum_localnet: EthereumLocalnet,
  arbitrum_localnet: ArbitrumLocalnet,
  base_sepolia: baseSepolia,
  base: base,
  bera_testnet: berachainTestnetbArtio,
  citrea: citreaMainnet,
  citrea_testnet: citreaTestnet,
  core: coreDao,
  bera: berachain,
  monad: monadMainnet,
  monad_testnet: monadTestnet,
  hyperliquid_testnet: hyperliquidTestnet,
  hyperevm: hyperevm,
  unichain: unichain,
  corn: corn,
  botanix: botanixMainnet,
  bnbchain: bsc,
  bnbchain_testnet: bscTestnet,
  alpen_testnet: alpenTestnet,
  hypercore: {} as viemChain,
  hypercore_testnet: {} as viemChain,
  hyperliquid: hyperevm,
  megaeth: megaethMainnet,
  hyperevm_testnet: hyperliquidTestnet,
};

export const getChainNameFromChainId = (chainId: number): EVMChains | null => {
  for (const [chainName, viemChain] of Object.entries(evmToViemChainMap)) {
    if (viemChain.id === chainId) return chainName as EVMChains;
  }
  return null;
};

/**
 * Switches or adds a network to the wallet
 * @param chain Garden supported chain
 * @param walletClient
 * @returns new walletClient with updated chain
 */
export const switchOrAddNetwork = async (
  chain: EVMChains,
  walletClient: WalletClient,
): AsyncResult<{ message: string; walletClient: WalletClient }, string> => {
  const chainID = evmToViemChainMap[chain];
  const currentChainId = await walletClient.getChainId();
  if (chainID) {
    try {
      if (chainID.id === currentChainId) {
        return Ok({ message: 'Already on the network', walletClient });
      }
      await walletClient.switchChain({ id: chainID.id });
      const newWalletClient = createWalletClient({
        account: walletClient.account,
        chain: chainID,
        transport: custom(walletClient.transport),
      });

      return Ok({
        message: 'Switched chain',
        walletClient: newWalletClient as WalletClient,
      });
    } catch (error) {
      // If switching fails, attempt to add the network
      if (isViemError(error)) {
        // Error code 4902 indicates the chain is not available in the wallet
        // Error code -32603 with "Unrecognized chain ID" also indicates chain not available
        if (error.code === 4902 || error.code === -32603) {
          try {
            await walletClient.addChain({ chain: chainID });
            const newWalletClient = createWalletClient({
              account: walletClient.account,
              chain: chainID,
              transport: custom(walletClient.transport),
            });

            return Ok({
              message: 'Added network',
              walletClient: newWalletClient as WalletClient,
            });
          } catch (addError) {
            return Err('Failed to add network');
          }
        } else if (
          error.body?.method?.includes('wallet_switchEthereumChain') ||
          error.message?.includes('wallet_switchEthereumChain')
        ) {
          const newWalletClient = createWalletClient({
            account: walletClient.account,
            chain: chainID,
            transport: http(),
          });
          return Ok({
            message: 'Added network',
            walletClient: newWalletClient as WalletClient,
          });
        } else {
          return Err('Failed to switch network');
        }
      } else {
        return Err('Failed to switch network');
      }
    }
  } else {
    return Err('Chain not supported');
  }
};

const isViemError = (error: unknown): error is ViemError => {
  return (
    typeof error === 'object' &&
    error != null &&
    ('code' in error || 'message' in error || 'body' in error)
  );
};
</file>

<file path="packages/core/src/lib/utils.ts">
import {
  APIResponse,
  AsyncResult,
  Environment,
  Err,
  Fetcher,
  Ok,
  Url,
  Network,
  IAuth,
  sleep,
  waitForTransactionReceipt,
} from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { AssetHTLCInfo, BlockchainType } from '@gardenfi/orderbook';
import { WalletClient } from 'viem';
import * as varuint from 'varuint-bitcoin';
import * as secp256k1 from 'tiny-secp256k1';
import * as bitcoin from 'bitcoinjs-lib';
import * as ecc from 'tiny-secp256k1';
// @ts-expect-error - bitcore-lib-ltc doesn't have type definitions
import bitcore from 'bitcore-lib-ltc';
import { bech32, bech32m } from 'bech32';
import { Signature } from 'starknet';
import { API, Api } from './constants';
import { ApiConfig, GardenHTLCModules } from './garden/garden.types';
import { BitcoinNetwork } from './bitcoin/provider/provider.interface';
import { web3 } from '@coral-xyz/anchor';
import { BigNumber } from 'bignumber.js';
import {
  decodeSparkAddress,
  type NetworkType as SparkNetworkType,
} from '@buildonspark/spark-sdk';

type ExecuteWithRelayerRetriesArgs = {
  attempt: () => AsyncResult<string, string>;
  wallet: WalletClient;
  maxAttempts?: number;
  baseDelayMs?: number;
};

export function resolveApiConfig(env: ApiConfig): {
  api: Api;
  network: Network;
} {
  const network = typeof env === 'string' ? env : env.network;

  const baseApi =
    network === Network.MAINNET
      ? API.mainnet
      : network === Network.TESTNET
        ? API.testnet
        : API.localnet;

  const api: Api =
    typeof env === 'string'
      ? baseApi
      : {
        ...baseApi,
        ...env,
      };

  return { api, network };
}

/**
 * Given a hex string or a buffer, return the x-only pubkey. (removes y coordinate the prefix)
 */
export function xOnlyPubkey(pubkey: Buffer | string): Buffer {
  if (typeof pubkey === 'string') pubkey = Buffer.from(pubkey, 'hex');
  return pubkey.length === 32 ? pubkey : pubkey.subarray(1, 33);
}

export function assert(condition: boolean, message: string): void {
  if (!condition) throw new Error(message);
}

/**
 * concat the leaf version, the length of the script, and the script itself
 */
export function serializeScript(leafScript: Buffer) {
  return Buffer.concat([
    Uint8Array.from([0xc0]),
    prefixScriptLength(leafScript),
  ]);
}

/**
 * concat the length of the script and the script itself
 */
export function prefixScriptLength(s: Buffer): Buffer {
  const varintLen = varuint.encodingLength(s.length);
  const buffer = Buffer.allocUnsafe(varintLen);
  varuint.encode(s.length, buffer);
  return Buffer.concat([buffer, s]);
}

export function sortLeaves(leaf1: Buffer, leaf2: Buffer) {
  if (leaf1.compare(leaf2) > 0) {
    const temp = leaf1;
    leaf1 = leaf2;
    leaf2 = temp;
  }
  return [leaf1, leaf2];
}

export const toXOnly = (pubKey: string) =>
  pubKey.length === 64 ? pubKey : pubKey.slice(2);

export const isValidBitcoinPubKey = (pubKey: string): boolean => {
  if (!pubKey) return false;

  try {
    const pubKeyBuffer = Buffer.from(pubKey, 'hex');
    return secp256k1.isPoint(pubKeyBuffer);
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
};

export function validateBTCAddress(address: string, networkType: Environment) {
  if (!address) return false;
  const network =
    networkType === Environment.MAINNET
      ? bitcoin.networks.bitcoin
      : networkType === Environment.TESTNET
        ? bitcoin.networks.testnet
        : bitcoin.networks.regtest;

  if (!network) return false;
  bitcoin.initEccLib(ecc);
  try {
    bitcoin.address.toOutputScript(address, network);
    return true;
  } catch {
    // console.error(e);
    return false;
  }
}

export function validateSparkAddress(
  address: string,
  networkType: Environment,
): boolean {
  if (!address) return false;

  const sparkNetwork: SparkNetworkType =
    networkType === Environment.MAINNET ? 'MAINNET' : 'REGTEST';
  try {
    decodeSparkAddress(address, sparkNetwork);
    return true;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

export function validateLTCAddress(address: string, networkType: Environment) {
  if (!address) return false;

  let network;
  if (networkType === Environment.MAINNET) {
    network = bitcore.Networks.livenet;
  } else if (networkType === Environment.TESTNET) {
    network = bitcore.Networks.testnet;
  } else {
    // For localnet/regtest, use testnet network
    network = bitcore.Networks.testnet;
  }

  if (!network) return false;

  try {
    bitcore.Address.fromString(address, network);
    return true;
  } catch {
    // If bitcore fails, fall back to explicit bech32/bech32m validation.
    const lower = address.toLowerCase();
    const isMainnet = networkType === Environment.MAINNET;

    // Litecoin bech32 HRPs:
    const expectedHrp = isMainnet ? 'ltc' : 'tltc';
    if (!lower.startsWith(expectedHrp + '1')) return false;

    // Try bech32 first (P2WPKH/P2WSH), then bech32m (taproot).
    const decoders = [bech32.decode, bech32m.decode] as const;

    for (const decode of decoders) {
      try {
        const decoded = decode(lower);
        if (decoded.prefix !== expectedHrp) continue;

        const words = decoded.words;
        if (words.length === 0) continue;

        const version = words[0];
        const data = words.slice(1);

        if (version < 0 || version > 16) continue;

        const program = bech32.fromWords(data);

        if (program.length !== 20 && program.length !== 32) continue;

        return true;
      } catch {
        // try next decoder
        continue;
      }
    }

    return false;
  }
}

export function generateOutputs(output: Buffer, count: number): Buffer[] {
  const outputs: Buffer[] = [];
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    outputs.push(output);
  }
  return outputs;
}

export const getBitcoinNetworkFromEnvironment = (
  network: Network,
): BitcoinNetwork => {
  switch (network) {
    case Network.MAINNET:
      return BitcoinNetwork.Mainnet;
    case Network.TESTNET:
      return BitcoinNetwork.Testnet;
    case Network.LOCALNET:
      return BitcoinNetwork.Regtest;
    default:
      throw new Error(`Invalid bitcoin network ${network}`);
  }
};

export const getBitcoinNetworkFromNetwork = (network: Network) => {
  switch (network) {
    case Network.MAINNET:
      return bitcoin.networks.bitcoin;
    case Network.TESTNET:
      return bitcoin.networks.testnet;
    case Network.LOCALNET:
      return bitcoin.networks.regtest;
    default:
      throw new Error(`Invalid bitcoin network ${network}`);
  }
};

export const isHexString = (value: string): boolean => {
  const hex = value.toLowerCase().replace('0x', '');
  return /^[0-9a-f]+$/.test(hex);
};

export const formatStarknetSignature = (sig: Signature) => {
  // Handle object format
  if (typeof sig === 'object' && 'r' in sig && 's' in sig) {
    return Ok([sig.r.toString(), sig.s.toString()]);
  }

  // Handle array format
  if (Array.isArray(sig)) {
    const result = sig.map((value) => {
      if (typeof value === 'string' && value.startsWith('0x')) {
        if (isHexString(value)) {
          return BigInt(value).toString();
        }
      }
      return value;
    });
    return Ok(result.join(','));
  }

  return Err('Invalid signature format');
};

export function reversify(val: string): Buffer {
  return Buffer.from(val, 'hex').reverse();
}

export function isErrorWithMessage(err: unknown): err is { message: string } {
  return (
    typeof err === 'object' &&
    err !== null &&
    'message' in err &&
    typeof (err as any).message === 'string'
  );
}

export const waitForSolanaTxConfirmation = async (
  connection: web3.Connection,
  txHash: string,
): Promise<boolean> => {
  const startTime = Date.now();
  const MAX_DURATION = 30_000;
  const RETRY_INTERVAL = 2_000;

  while (Date.now() - startTime < MAX_DURATION) {
    const latestBlockhash = await connection.getLatestBlockhash();

    const confirmation = await connection.confirmTransaction(
      {
        signature: txHash,
        blockhash: latestBlockhash.blockhash,
        lastValidBlockHeight: latestBlockhash.lastValidBlockHeight,
      },
      'confirmed',
    );

    if (confirmation.value && confirmation.value.err == null) {
      console.log('Tx Confirmed ✅', txHash);
      return true;
    }

    console.log('Tx not confirmed yet. Retrying in 2 seconds...');
    await new Promise((res) => setTimeout(res, RETRY_INTERVAL));
  }

  return false;
};

export const getAssetInfoFromOrder = async (
  order: string,
  url: Url,
  auth: IAuth,
): Promise<
  AsyncResult<{ htlcAddress: string; tokenAddress: string }, string>
> => {
  const headers = await auth.getAuthHeaders();
  if (!headers.ok) return Err(headers.error);

  const assetInfoRes = await Fetcher.get<APIResponse<AssetHTLCInfo[]>>(
    url + '/v2/assets',
    {
      headers: {
        ...headers.val,
      },
    },
  );

  if (assetInfoRes.error) {
    return Err('Failed to fetch asset info: ' + assetInfoRes.error);
  }

  const assetList = assetInfoRes.result || [];
  const assetInfo = assetList.find((a) => a.id === order);

  if (!assetInfo) {
    return Err(`Asset info not found for asset id: ${order}`);
  }

  const htlcAddress = assetInfo.htlc?.address || '';
  const tokenAddress = assetInfo.token?.address || '';

  return Ok({ htlcAddress, tokenAddress });
};

export const validateAmount = (amount: string) => {
  if (amount == null || amount.includes('.'))
    return Err('Invalid amount ', amount);
  const amountBigInt = new BigNumber(amount);
  if (
    !amountBigInt.isInteger() ||
    amountBigInt.isNaN() ||
    amountBigInt.lt(0) ||
    amountBigInt.isLessThanOrEqualTo(0)
  )
    return Err('Invalid amount ', amount);
  return Ok(amountBigInt);
};

/**
 *
 * @param blockchainType
 * @param htlcs
 * @returns
 */
export const getAddresses = async (
  blockchainType: BlockchainType,
  htlcs: GardenHTLCModules,
) => {
  if (
    blockchainType === BlockchainType.bitcoin ||
    blockchainType === BlockchainType.litecoin ||
    blockchainType === BlockchainType.alpen_signet ||
    blockchainType === BlockchainType.spark
  ) {
    const module = htlcs[blockchainType];

    const pubKey = module?.getPublicKey;
    if (!pubKey || !isValidBitcoinPubKey(pubKey)) {
      return Err(
        'Invalid btc public key or pass Bitcoin address in SwapParams',
      );
    }

    return Ok(toXOnly(pubKey));
  }

  const module = htlcs[blockchainType as keyof GardenHTLCModules] as
    | { htlcActorAddress: string }
    | undefined;

  if (!module?.htlcActorAddress) {
    return Err(
      `Please provide ${blockchainType}HTLC when initializing garden or pass ${blockchainType} address in SwapParams`,
    );
  }

  return Ok(module.htlcActorAddress);
};

/**
 * Validates that HTLCs are available for the required blockchain types for swap initiation
 * @param blockchainType The blockchain type to check
 * @returns AsyncResult<void, string>
 */
export const validateHTLCForSwap = async (
  blockchainType: BlockchainType,
  htlcs: GardenHTLCModules,
): Promise<AsyncResult<void, string>> => {
  const htlcMap: Record<BlockchainType, { htlc: any; name: string }> = {
    [BlockchainType.evm]: { htlc: htlcs.evm, name: 'EVM' },
    [BlockchainType.solana]: { htlc: htlcs.solana, name: 'Solana' },
    [BlockchainType.starknet]: {
      htlc: htlcs.starknet,
      name: 'Starknet',
    },
    [BlockchainType.sui]: { htlc: htlcs.sui, name: 'Sui' },
    [BlockchainType.bitcoin]: { htlc: htlcs.bitcoin, name: 'Bitcoin' },
    [BlockchainType.tron]: { htlc: htlcs.tron, name: 'Tron' },
    [BlockchainType.litecoin]: { htlc: htlcs.litecoin, name: 'Litecoin' },
    [BlockchainType.alpen_signet]: {
      htlc: htlcs.alpen_signet,
      name: 'Alpen Signet',
    },
    [BlockchainType.xrpl]: { htlc: htlcs.xrpl, name: 'XRPL' },
    [BlockchainType.spark]: { htlc: htlcs.spark, name: 'Spark' },
  };

  if (
    blockchainType === BlockchainType.bitcoin ||
    blockchainType === BlockchainType.litecoin ||
    blockchainType === BlockchainType.alpen_signet ||
    blockchainType === BlockchainType.spark
  ) {
    return Ok(undefined);
  }

  const entry = htlcMap[blockchainType];
  if (!entry) {
    return Err(
      `Unsupported blockchain type for swap initiation: ${blockchainType}`,
    );
  }
  if (!entry.htlc) {
    return Err(
      `${entry.name
      } HTLC is required for swap initiation. Please provide ${entry.name.toLowerCase()}HTLC when initializing garden.`,
    );
  }
  return Ok(undefined);
};

const ALREADY_INITIATED_SIGNATURES = ['0x90c06174', '0xee1b963b'];

const toMessage = (error: unknown): string => {
  if (!error) return '';

  if (typeof error === 'string') return error;

  if (error instanceof Error) {
    const segments = [
      error.message,
      (error as { shortMessage?: string }).shortMessage,
      (error as { reason?: string }).reason,
      (error as { signature?: string }).signature,
      (error as { stack?: string }).stack,
    ].filter(Boolean) as string[];

    return segments.join(' | ');
  }

  if (typeof error === 'object') {
    const maybeMessage = (error as { message?: unknown }).message;
    if (typeof maybeMessage === 'string') return maybeMessage;

    try {
      return JSON.stringify(error);
    } catch {
      return String(error);
    }
  }

  return String(error);
};

export const isAlreadyInitiatedError = (error: unknown): boolean => {
  const message = toMessage(error).toLowerCase();
  return ALREADY_INITIATED_SIGNATURES.some((sig) =>
    message.includes(sig.toLowerCase()),
  );
};

const isChainUnsupportedForInitiationsError = (error: string): boolean => {
  return error.toLowerCase().includes('not supported for initiations');
};

export const executeWithRelayerRetries = async ({
  attempt,
  wallet,
  maxAttempts = 1,
  baseDelayMs = 1000,
}: ExecuteWithRelayerRetriesArgs): Promise<string | null> => {
  for (let i = 0; i < maxAttempts; i++) {
    const result = await attempt();

    if (result.error && isChainUnsupportedForInitiationsError(result.error))
      break;

    if (result.ok) {
      const receipt = await waitForTransactionReceipt(
        wallet,
        result.val as `0x${string}`,
      );

      if (!receipt.ok) {
        if (i < maxAttempts - 1) {
          await sleep(baseDelayMs * 2 ** i);
          continue;
        }
        break;
      }

      if (receipt.val?.status === 'success') return result.val;
    }

    if (i < maxAttempts - 1) {
      await sleep(baseDelayMs * 2 ** i);
    }
  }

  return null;
};
</file>

<file path="packages/walletConnectors/src/bitcoin/btcWalletsProvider.tsx">
import React, {
  useState,
  createContext,
  useContext,
  useEffect,
  useCallback,
  useMemo,
} from 'react';
import { Connect, IInjectedBitcoinProvider } from './bitcoin.types';
import { OKXProvider } from './providers/okx/provider';
import { OKXBitcoinProvider } from './providers/okx/okx.types';
import { UnisatBitcoinProvider } from './providers/unisat/unisat.types';
import { XVerseBitcoinProvider } from './providers/xverse/xverse.types';
import { XdefiBitcoinProvider } from './providers/xdefi/xdefi.types';
import { CtrlLitecoinProvider } from '../litecoin/providers/ctrl/ctrl.types';
import { PhantomBitcoinProvider } from './providers/phantom/phantom.types';
import { KeplrBitcoinProvider } from './providers/keplr/keplr.types';
import { UnisatProvider } from './providers/unisat/provider';
import { PhantomProvider } from './providers/phantom/provider';
import { XverseProvider } from './providers/xverse/provider';
import { KeplrProvider } from './providers/keplr/provider';
// import { XdefiProvider } from './providers/xdefi/provider';
import {
  AvailableWallets,
  BTCWalletProviderContextType,
  BTCWalletProviderProps,
} from './btcWalletsProvider.types';
import { Err, Network, Ok, Void } from '@gardenfi/utils';

declare global {
  interface Window {
    okxwallet?: {
      bitcoin?: OKXBitcoinProvider;
      bitcoinTestnet?: OKXBitcoinProvider;
    };
    XverseProviders?: {
      BitcoinProvider: XVerseBitcoinProvider;
    };
    unisat?: UnisatBitcoinProvider;
    xfi?: {
      bitcoin: XdefiBitcoinProvider;
      litecoin?: CtrlLitecoinProvider;
    };
    phantom?: {
      bitcoin: PhantomBitcoinProvider;
    };
    keplr?: {
      bitcoin: KeplrBitcoinProvider;
    };
  }
}

const BTCWalletProviderContext = createContext<
  BTCWalletProviderContextType | undefined
>(undefined);

export const BTCWalletProvider = ({
  children,
  network,
  store,
  wallets,
}: BTCWalletProviderProps) => {
  const [provider, setProvider] = useState<IInjectedBitcoinProvider>();
  const [account, setAccount] = useState<string>();
  const [isConnecting, setIsConnecting] = useState<boolean>(false);
  const [availableWallets, setAvailableWallets] = useState<AvailableWallets>(
    {},
  );

  const isConnected = useMemo(
    () => !!provider && !!account,
    [provider, account],
  );

  //connect to the specified wallet and set the provider and account
  const connect = async (bitcoinWallet: IInjectedBitcoinProvider) => {
    setIsConnecting(true);
    const res = await bitcoinWallet.connect(network);
    if (!res.ok) {
      setIsConnecting(false);
      return Err(res.error);
    }

    if (res.val.network !== network) {
      setIsConnecting(false);
      return Err('Network mismatch');
    }

    setProvider(res.val.provider);
    setAccount(res.val.address);

    store.setItem('bitcoinWallet', JSON.stringify(res.val));

    setIsConnecting(false);
    return Ok(Void);
  };

  const disconnect = () => {
    if (!provider) return Err('No provider to disconnect');
    provider.disconnect();
    setProvider(undefined);
    setAccount(undefined);

    store.removeItem('bitcoinWallet');

    return Ok(Void);
  };

  const updateAccount = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!provider) return;

    const accounts = await provider.getAccounts();
    if (!accounts.ok) {
      console.error('Error getting accounts:', accounts.error);
      return;
    }

    setAccount(accounts.val[0]);

    const network = await provider.getNetwork();
    if (network.error) {
      console.error('Error getting network:', network.error);
      return;
    }
  }, [provider]);

  //adds wallet to the available wallet list
  const addToWalletList = (wallet: IInjectedBitcoinProvider) => {
    setAvailableWallets((p) => ({
      ...p,
      [wallet.id]: wallet,
    }));
  };

  const updateWalletList = async () => {
    if (
      window.okxwallet &&
      window.okxwallet.bitcoin &&
      window.okxwallet.bitcoinTestnet
    ) {
      const okxProvider = new OKXProvider(
        network === Network.MAINNET
          ? window.okxwallet.bitcoin
          : window.okxwallet.bitcoinTestnet,
        network,
      );
      addToWalletList(okxProvider);
    }
    if (
      network === Network.MAINNET &&
      window.phantom &&
      window.phantom.bitcoin
    ) {
      const phantomProvider = new PhantomProvider(window.phantom.bitcoin);
      addToWalletList(phantomProvider);
    }
    if (window.unisat) {
      const uniProvider = new UnisatProvider(window.unisat, network);
      addToWalletList(uniProvider);
    }
    if (window.XverseProviders && window.XverseProviders.BitcoinProvider) {
      const xverseProvider = new XverseProvider(
        window.XverseProviders.BitcoinProvider,
      );
      addToWalletList(xverseProvider);
    }
    if (network === Network.MAINNET && window.keplr && window.keplr.bitcoin) {
      const keplrProvider = new KeplrProvider(window.keplr.bitcoin);
      addToWalletList(keplrProvider);
    }
    // if (window.xfi && window.xfi.bitcoin) {
    //   const xdefiProvider = new XdefiProvider(window.xfi.bitcoin);
    //   addToWalletList(BitcoinWallets.XDEFI, xdefiProvider);
    //   const res = await xdefiProvider.getAccounts();
    //   setAccount(res.val[0]);
    // }

    // add the extra wallets to the available wallets list
    wallets?.forEach((wallet) => {
      addToWalletList(wallet.provider);
    });
  };

  const initializeProviderAndAccount = async () => {
    const previousConnectedData = store.getItem('bitcoinWallet');
    if (previousConnectedData) {
      const isAlreadyConnected: Connect = JSON.parse(previousConnectedData);
      const _provider = availableWallets[isAlreadyConnected.id];
      if (_provider) {
        const addresses = await _provider.getAccounts();
        if (!addresses.ok || !addresses.val[0]) return;

        const currentNetwork = await _provider.getNetwork();
        if (currentNetwork.error) return;
        if (currentNetwork.val !== network) return;

        setProvider(_provider);
        setAccount(addresses.val[0]);
      }
    }
  };

  // updates the available wallets list
  useEffect(() => {
    updateWalletList();
  }, []);

  // if the wallet is already connected then set the provider and account
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!availableWallets) return;
    initializeProviderAndAccount();
  }, [availableWallets]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!provider) return;

    const handleAccountsChanged = async (accounts: string[]) => {
      if (accounts.length === 0) return;
      setAccount(accounts[0]);
    };
    provider.on('accountsChanged', handleAccountsChanged);

    return () => {
      provider.off('accountsChanged', handleAccountsChanged);
    };
  }, [provider]);

  return (
    <BTCWalletProviderContext.Provider
      value={{
        availableWallets,
        connect,
        provider,
        account,
        network,
        isConnecting,
        updateAccount,
        disconnect,
        isConnected,
      }}
    >
      {children}
    </BTCWalletProviderContext.Provider>
  );
};

export const useBitcoinWallet = () => {
  const context = useContext(BTCWalletProviderContext);
  if (!context) {
    throw new Error('useBitcoinWallet must be used within BTCWalletProvider');
  }
  return context;
};
</file>

<file path="packages/core/src/lib/quote/quote.ts">
import {
  Err,
  Fetcher,
  IAuth,
  Ok,
  Request as UtilsRequest,
} from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { IQuote, QuoteParamsForAssets, QuoteResponse } from './quote.types';
import { AssetLike, ChainAsset } from '@gardenfi/orderbook';
import { APIResponse, Url } from '@gardenfi/utils';

export class Quote implements IQuote {
  private quoteUrl: Url;
  private auth: IAuth;

  constructor(quoteUrl: string, auth: IAuth) {
    this.quoteUrl = new Url(quoteUrl);
    this.auth = auth;
  }

  async getQuoteFromAssets({
    fromAsset,
    toAsset,
    amount,
    isExactOut = false,
    options
  }: QuoteParamsForAssets) {
    const from = ChainAsset.from(fromAsset);
    const to = ChainAsset.from(toAsset);

    return this.getQuote(from, to, amount, isExactOut, options);
  }

  async getQuote(
    from: AssetLike,
    to: AssetLike,
    amount: number,
    isExactOut = false,
    options?: {
      affiliateFee?: number;
      request?: UtilsRequest;
      indicative?: boolean;
    }
  ) {
    try {
      const headers = await this.auth.getAuthHeaders();
      if (headers.error) {
        return Err(headers.error);
      }

      const params: Record<string, string> = {
        from: ChainAsset.from(from).toString(),
        to: ChainAsset.from(to).toString(),
        ...(isExactOut
          ? { to_amount: amount.toString() }
          : { from_amount: amount.toString() }),
        ...(options?.affiliateFee !== undefined && {
          affiliate_fee: options.affiliateFee.toString(),
        }),
        ...(options?.indicative !== undefined && {
          indicative: options.indicative.toString(),
        })
      };

      const url = this.quoteUrl.endpoint('/v2/quote').addSearchParams(params);

      const res = await Fetcher.get<APIResponse<QuoteResponse[]>>(url, {
        retryCount: 0,
        ...options?.request,
        headers: {
          ...headers.val,
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
      });

      if (res.error) return Err(res.error);
      if (!res.result)
        return Err('GetQuote: Unexpected error, result is undefined');

      return Ok(res.result);
    } catch (error) {
      return Err('GetQuote:', String(error));
    }
  }
}
</file>

<file path="packages/core/src/lib/quote/quote.types.ts">
import { Asset, AssetLike, Chain, ChainAsset } from '@gardenfi/orderbook';
import { APIResponse, AsyncResult, Request } from '@gardenfi/utils';

export interface IQuote {
  /**
   * Get a quote for the given assets and amount
   * @param fromAsset - The asset to swap from
   * @param toAsset - The asset to swap to
   *
   * @param amount - The amount to quote
   * @param isExactOut - Whether the amount is exact out
   * @param options { affiliateFee?: number; request?: Request } - The options for the quote request, affiliate fee in bps and request object
   *
   */
  getQuoteFromAssets(
    params: QuoteParamsForAssets,
  ): AsyncResult<QuoteResponse[], string>;

  /**
   * Get a quote for the given orderpair and amount
   * @param orderpair - A string representing the order pair for which the quote is requested.
   *
   * ``eg:- bitcoin_regtest:primary::arbitrum_localnet:0xDc64a140Aa3E981100a9becA4E685f962f0cF6C9``
   *
   * Chain name and asset are separated by a colon(:) and chain pairs are separated by double colon(::)
   * @param amount - The amount to quote
   * @param isExactOut - Whether the amount is exact out
   * @param options { affiliateFee?: number; request?: Request; indicative?: boolean } - The options for the quote request, affiliate fee in bps, request object and indicative flag to ignore liquidity checks
   */
  getQuote(
    from: AssetLike,
    to: AssetLike,
    amount: number,
    isExactOut: boolean,
    options?: QuoteOptions,
  ): AsyncResult<QuoteResponse[], string>;
}

export type QuoteOptions = {
  affiliateFee?: number;
  request?: Request;
  indicative?: boolean;
};

export type BaseQuoteParams = {
  amount: number;
  isExactOut?: boolean;
  options?: QuoteOptions;
};

export type QuoteParamsForAssets = BaseQuoteParams & {
  fromAsset: Asset;
  toAsset: Asset;
};

export type QuoteParamsForOrderPair = BaseQuoteParams & {
  from: ChainAsset;
  to: ChainAsset;
};

export type QuoteResponse = {
  source: {
    asset: string;
    amount: string;
    display: string;
    value: string;
  };
  destination: {
    asset: string;
    amount: string;
    display: string;
    value: string;
  };
  solver_id: string;
  estimated_time: number;
  slippage: number;
  fee: number;
  fixed_fee: string;
};
export type Strategies = Record<
  string,
  {
    id: string;
    minAmount: string;
    maxAmount: string;
    fee: number;
    fixed_fee: number;
  }
>;

export type StrategiesResponse = APIResponse<{
  [strategy: string]: {
    id: string;
    min_amount: string;
    max_amount: string;
    fee: number;
    source_chain: Chain;
    dest_chain: Chain;
    fixed_fee: string;
    source_asset: {
      asset: string;
      token_id: string;
      decimals: number;
    };
    dest_asset: {
      asset: string;
      token_id: string;
      decimals: number;
    };
  };
}>;
</file>

<file path="packages/orderbook/src/lib/ExplorerUrlBuilder/ExplorerUrlBuilder.ts">
import { Url } from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { Network } from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { getBlockchainType } from '../constants/asset';
import { BlockchainType, Chain } from '../constants/asset.types';

interface LinkBuilder {
  address: (baseUrl: string, address: string, network: Network) => string;
  tx: (baseUrl: string, txHash: string, network: Network) => string;
}

const LINK_BUILDERS: Partial<Record<BlockchainType, LinkBuilder>> & { default: LinkBuilder } = {
    [BlockchainType.bitcoin]: {
      address: (baseUrl, address) => new Url('address', baseUrl).endpoint(address).toString(),
      tx: (baseUrl, txHash) => new Url('tx', baseUrl).endpoint(txHash).toString(),
    },
    [BlockchainType.tron]: {
      address: (baseUrl, address) => `${baseUrl}/#/address/${address}`,
      tx: (baseUrl, txHash) => `${baseUrl}/#/transaction/${txHash.slice(2)}`,
    },
    [BlockchainType.starknet]: {
      address: (baseUrl, address) => new Url('contract', baseUrl).endpoint(address).toString(),
      tx: (baseUrl, txHash) => new Url('tx', baseUrl).endpoint(txHash).toString(),
    },
    [BlockchainType.xrpl]: {
      address: (baseUrl, address) => new Url('accounts', baseUrl).endpoint(address).toString(),
      tx: (baseUrl, txHash) => new Url('transactions', baseUrl).endpoint(txHash).toString(),
    },
    [BlockchainType.solana]: {
      address: (baseUrl, address, network) => {
        let url = new Url('address', baseUrl).endpoint(address);
        if (network === Network.TESTNET) {
          url = url.addSearchParams({ cluster: 'devnet' });
        }
        return url.toString();
      },
      tx: (baseUrl, txHash, network) => {
        let url = new Url('tx', baseUrl).endpoint(txHash);
        if (network === Network.TESTNET) {
          url = url.addSearchParams({ cluster: 'devnet' });
        }
        return url.toString();
      },
    },
    default: {
      address: (baseUrl, address) => new Url('address', baseUrl).endpoint(address).toString(),
      tx: (baseUrl, txHash) => new Url('tx', baseUrl).endpoint(txHash).toString(),
    },
};

export class ExplorerUrlBuilder {
  private readonly explorerUrl: string;
  private readonly network: Network;
  private readonly chainType: BlockchainType | 'default';

  constructor(chain: Chain, explorerUrl: string, network: Network) {
    this.explorerUrl = explorerUrl;
    this.network = network;
    this.chainType = getBlockchainType(chain);
  }

  static from(chain: Chain, explorerUrl: string, network: Network): ExplorerUrlBuilder {
    return new ExplorerUrlBuilder(chain, explorerUrl, network);
  }

  getAddressLink(address: string): string {
    const builder = LINK_BUILDERS[this.chainType] ?? LINK_BUILDERS.default;
    return builder.address(this.explorerUrl, address, this.network);
  }

  getTxLink(tx: string): string {
    const txHash = this.extractTxHash(tx);
    const builder = LINK_BUILDERS[this.chainType] ?? LINK_BUILDERS.default;
    return builder.tx(this.explorerUrl, txHash, this.network);
  }

  private extractTxHash(tx: string): string {
    return tx.split(',').at(-1)?.split(':').at(0)?.trim() ?? '';
  }
}
</file>
