<file path="packages/walletConnectors/src/spark/providers/xverse/provider.ts">
import { WALLET_CONFIG } from '../../constants';
import {
  Balance,
  SparkConnect,
  IInjectedSparkProvider,
} from '../../spark.types';
import { XverseSparkNetworkType, XVerseSparkProvider } from './xverse.types';
import {
  AsyncResult,
  Err,
  executeWithTryCatch,
  Network,
  Ok,
} from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { request } from 'sats-connect';

export class XverseSparkProvider implements IInjectedSparkProvider {
  #xverseProvider: XVerseSparkProvider;
  public address = '';
  public id = WALLET_CONFIG.Xverse.id;
  public name = WALLET_CONFIG.Xverse.name;
  public icon = WALLET_CONFIG.Xverse.icon;

  constructor(provider: XVerseSparkProvider) {
    this.#xverseProvider = provider;
  }

  connect = async (network?: Network): AsyncResult<SparkConnect, string> => {
    try {
      if (!network) network = Network.TESTNET;

      const targetNetwork =
        network === Network.MAINNET
          ? XverseSparkNetworkType.Mainnet
          : XverseSparkNetworkType.Regtest;

      // Connect to wallet using sats-connect
      await this.#xverseProvider.request('wallet_connect', {
        network: targetNetwork,
      });

      const addresses = await this.getAccounts();
      if (!addresses.ok) {
        return Err(
          addresses.error ?? 'Failed to get accounts from XVerse Spark wallet',
        );
      }
      if (addresses.val.length === 0) {
        return Err(
          'No Spark addresses found. Please unlock your XVerse wallet and ensure a Spark account is available.',
        );
      }
      this.address = addresses.val[0];

      return Ok({
        address: this.address,
        provider: this,
        network: network,
        id: WALLET_CONFIG.Xverse.id,
      });
    } catch (error) {
      return Err('Error while connecting to the XVerse Spark wallet', error);
    }
  };

  getBalance = async () => {
    return await executeWithTryCatch(async () => {
      const response = await request('spark_getBalance', null);
      if (response.status === 'success' && response.result) {
        const result = response.result as { balance: string };
        // Convert Spark balance format to our Balance format
        const balanceValue = parseInt(result.balance || '0', 10);
        return {
          confirmed: balanceValue,
          unconfirmed: 0,
          total: balanceValue,
        } as Balance;
      }
      throw new Error('Failed to get Spark balance');
    }, 'Error while getting balance from XVerse Spark wallet');
  };

  requestAccounts = async (): AsyncResult<string[], string> => {
    return await executeWithTryCatch(async () => {
      // Use spark_getAddresses for Spark wallet
      const res = await request('spark_getAddresses', null);
      if (res.status === 'success' && res.result) {
        const result = res.result as { addresses: Array<{ address: string }> };
        const addresses = result.addresses
          .map((addr) => addr.address?.trim() ?? '')
          .filter((addr) => addr.length > 0);
        if (addresses.length === 0) {
          throw new Error(
            'No valid Spark addresses returned. Please ensure your XVerse wallet has a Spark account.',
          );
        }
        return addresses;
      }
      throw new Error('Failed to get Spark addresses');
    }, 'Error while requesting accounts from XVerse Spark wallet');
  };

  getAccounts = async (): AsyncResult<string[], string> => {
    return await executeWithTryCatch(async () => {
      // Use spark_getAddresses for Spark wallet
      const res = await request('spark_getAddresses', null);
      if (res.status === 'success' && res.result) {
        const result = res.result as { addresses: Array<{ address: string }> };
        const addresses = result.addresses
          .map((addr) => addr.address?.trim() ?? '')
          .filter((addr) => addr.length > 0);
        if (addresses.length === 0) {
          throw new Error(
            'No valid Spark addresses returned. Please ensure your XVerse wallet has a Spark account.',
          );
        }
        return addresses;
      }
      throw new Error('Failed to get Spark addresses');
    }, 'Error while getting accounts from XVerse Spark wallet');
  };

  sendSpark = async (
    toAddress: string,
    satoshis: number,
  ): AsyncResult<string, string> => {
    return await executeWithTryCatch(async () => {
      // Use spark_transfer for Spark wallet
      const res = await request('spark_transfer', {
        receiverSparkAddress: toAddress,
        amountSats: satoshis,
      });
      if (res.status === 'success' && res.result) {
        return res.result.id;
      }
      throw new Error('Failed to send Spark transaction');
    }, 'Error while sending Spark from Xverse Spark wallet');
  };

  async getNetwork() {
    return await executeWithTryCatch(async () => {
      // Get Spark network using spark_getAddresses to determine network
      const res = await request('wallet_getNetwork', null);
      if (res.status === 'success' && res.result) {
        const result = res.result as unknown as {
          spark?: { name: string };
        };
        // Check network from result.network.spark
        if (result?.spark?.name === XverseSparkNetworkType.Mainnet) {
          return Network.MAINNET;
        } else if (result?.spark?.name === XverseSparkNetworkType.Regtest) {
          return Network.TESTNET;
        }
      }

      throw new Error('Could not determine Spark network');
    }, 'Error while getting network from Xverse Spark wallet');
  }

  async switchNetwork(): AsyncResult<Network, string> {
    try {
      const currentNetwork = await this.getNetwork();
      if (currentNetwork.error) {
        return Err('Failed to get current network');
      }

      const toNetwork =
        currentNetwork.val === Network.MAINNET
          ? XverseSparkNetworkType.Regtest
          : XverseSparkNetworkType.Mainnet;

      // Try to switch network using wallet_changeNetwork
      try {
        await this.#xverseProvider.request('wallet_changeNetwork', {
          name: toNetwork,
        });
      } catch (e) {
        // Network switching might not be directly supported for Spark
        // User may need to switch manually in wallet
        return Err(
          'Network switching not supported. Please switch network manually in Xverse wallet.',
        );
      }

      const newNetwork = await this.getNetwork();
      if (!newNetwork.ok) {
        return Err('Failed to verify network switch');
      }

      return Ok(newNetwork.val);
    } catch (error) {
      return Err('Error while switching network in Xverse Spark:', error);
    }
  }

  /**
   * not available in XVerse Spark wallet
   */
  on = () => {};

  /**
   * not available in XVerse Spark wallet
   */
  off = () => {};

  disconnect = (): AsyncResult<string, string> => {
    this.address = '';
    return Promise.resolve(Ok('Disconnected'));
  };
}
</file>

<file path="packages/orderbook/src/index.ts">
export { Orderbook } from './lib/orderbook/orderbook';
export type * from './lib/orderbook/orderbook.types';

export { BlockchainType } from './lib/constants/asset.types';
export type {
  Asset,
  BitcoinChains,
  Chain,
  ChainsByBlockchainType,
  ChainsByNetwork,
  EVMChains,
  LocalnetOnlyChains,
  MainnetOnlyChains,
  SolanaChains,
  SuiChains,
  StarknetChains,
  XrplChains,
  TestnetOnlyChains,
} from './lib/constants/asset.types';
export * from './lib/constants/asset';
export * from './lib/constants/localnetConstants';
export * from './lib/constants/utils';

export {
  isSuiOrderResponse,
  ConstructUrl,
  discriminateOrderResponse,
  getOrderResponseType,
  isBitcoinOrderResponse,
  isEvmOrderResponse,
  isOrder,
  isSolanaOrderResponse,
  isStarknetOrderResponse,
  isXrplOrderResponse,
} from "./lib/utils";
export { ChainAsset } from "./lib/chainAsset/chainAsset";
export type { ChainAssetString, AssetLike } from './lib/chainAsset/chainAsset';
export { ExplorerUrlBuilder } from './lib/ExplorerUrlBuilder/ExplorerUrlBuilder';
export {
  OrderAction,
  ParseOrderStatus,
  isCompleted,
  isDeadlinePassed,
  parseAction,
} from './lib/orderStatus/orderStatus';

export { AssetManager } from './lib/assetManager/AssetManager';
export type {
  ApiChainData,
  ApiChainsResponse,
  AssetManagerState,
  BaseChainData,
  ChainData,
  FiatResponse,
} from './lib/assetManager/types';

export { RouteValidator } from './lib/assetManager/routeValidator/routeValidator';
export type { RoutePolicy } from './lib/assetManager/routeValidator/routeValidator';
</file>

<file path="packages/orderbook/src/lib/constants/asset.ts">
import { Network } from '@gardenfi/utils';
import { BlockchainType, Chain, ChainsByBlockchainType } from './asset.types';
import {
  SOLSolanaLocalnetAsset,
  WBTCEthereumLocalnetAsset,
  bitcoinRegtestAsset,
  STRKStarknetLocalnetAsset,
  ETHStarknetLocalnetAsset,
  USDCArbitrumLocalnetAsset,
  USDCEthereumLocalnetAsset,
} from './localnetConstants';
import { buildAssetsWithChain } from './utils';
import { ChainAsset } from '../chainAsset/chainAsset';

export enum OrderStatus {
  Created = 'Created',
  InitiateDetected = 'Initiate Detected',
  Initiated = 'Initiated',
  AwaitingRedeem = 'Awaiting Redeem',
  RedeemDetected = 'Redeem Detected',
  Redeemed = 'Redeemed',
  AwaitingRefund = 'Awaiting Refund',
  RefundDetected = 'Refund Detected',
  Refunded = 'Refunded',
  Expired = 'Expired',
}

export enum OrderLifecycle {
  refunded = 'refunded',
  expired = 'expired',
  completed = 'completed',
  inProgress = 'in-progress',
  notInitiated = 'not-initiated',
  all = 'all',
  pending = 'pending',
  fulfilled = 'fulfilled',
}

export const Chains: Record<Chain, Chain> = Object.keys(Config).reduce(
  (acc, chain) => {
    acc[chain as Chain] = chain as Chain;
    return acc;
  },
  {} as Record<Chain, Chain>,
);

export const Assets = buildAssetsWithChain(Config);

export const isMainnet = (chain: Chain) =>
  Config[chain].network === Network.MAINNET;

export function is<T extends BlockchainType>(
  type: T,
): (chain: Chain) => chain is Extract<Chain, ChainsByBlockchainType<T>> {
  return (chain: Chain): chain is Extract<Chain, ChainsByBlockchainType<T>> => {
    return Config[chain] && Config[chain].type === type;
  };
}

export const isEVM = is(BlockchainType.evm);
export const isBitcoin = is(BlockchainType.bitcoin);
export const isLitecoin = is(BlockchainType.litecoin);
export const isSpark = is(BlockchainType.spark);
export const isSolana = is(BlockchainType.solana);
export const isStarknet = is(BlockchainType.starknet);
export const isSui = is(BlockchainType.sui);
export const isTron = is(BlockchainType.tron);
export const isXrpl = is(BlockchainType.xrpl);
export const isAlpenSignet = is(BlockchainType.alpen_signet);

export const getBlockchainType = (chain: Chain) => Config[chain].type;

export const NATIVE_TOKENS = {
  [BlockchainType.evm]: 'eth',
  [BlockchainType.solana]: 'sol',
  [BlockchainType.sui]: 'sui',
};

export const isEvmNativeToken = (chain: Chain, tokenAddress: string) => {
  return (
    isEVM(chain) &&
    tokenAddress.toLowerCase() === NATIVE_TOKENS[BlockchainType.evm]
  );
};

export const isSolanaNativeToken = (chain: Chain, tokenAddress: string) => {
  return (
    isSolana(chain) &&
    tokenAddress.toLowerCase() === NATIVE_TOKENS[BlockchainType.solana]
  );
};

export const isSuiNativeToken = (chain: Chain, tokenAddress: string) => {
  return (
    isSui(chain) &&
    tokenAddress.toLowerCase() === NATIVE_TOKENS[BlockchainType.sui]
  );
};

export const isNativeToken = (asset: ChainAsset) => {
  const chain = asset.chain;
  const tokenAddress = asset.symbol;
  return (
    isEvmNativeToken(chain, tokenAddress) ||
    isSolanaNativeToken(chain, tokenAddress) ||
    isBitcoin(chain) ||
    isLitecoin(chain) ||
    isSpark(chain) ||
    isSuiNativeToken(chain, tokenAddress) ||
    // Starknet doesn't have a native token
    !isStarknet(chain)
  );
};
